Bolster our local infrastructure Whether it is new funding for improved road links, or better broadband, we must ensure our communities are as connected and productive as possible. I will... Keep our community safe We all want to feel safe in our homes and on the streets. I fully support Lincolnshire Police to crack down hard on criminals who seek to do us harm. I am proud... Campaign for strong local healthcare We all want reliable access to a GP, dental services, and our hospital. From day one I have held local NHS authorities to account to deliver excellent local... Champion our local schools and colleges We have some of the best schools in the region. It is vital that we continue to support them to succeed and fund them appropriately. Our children deserve happy... Back local businesses Thriving local businesses provide valuable jobs, products, and services for our local communities.
